title: Crispy Bitter French Egg Muffins
description: A cozy French-inspired breakfast featuring crispy, savory muffins packed with bitter kale, Parmesan, and a touch of lemon zest.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F) and line a muffin tin with parchment paper.
In a pan, sauté the chopped kale in a splash of olive oil until just wilted, then set aside to cool slightly.
Whisk the eggs with milk, salt, pepper, thyme, Dijon mustard, and lemon zest until well combined.
Fold in the warm kale, grated Parmesan, and breadcrumbs, mixing until evenly distributed.
Divide the batter evenly among the 12 muffin cups, pressing down slightly, and drizzle a teaspoon of olive oil into each cup to promote crispness.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the tops are golden and the centers are set.
Remove from oven and allow the muffins to cool in the tin for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack.
Garnish with chopped fresh chives if desired and serve warm or at room temperature.
